subject: [PATCH 5/6] mm/migrate_device: move softleaf_to_folio() inside device-private branch

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Identified the patch as correct and suitable for inclusion in the kernel, with no further comments or concerns.

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch moves the call to softleaf_to_folio() inside a device-private branch in the mm/migrate_device.c file, ensuring that the folio is only converted when it's actually needed and preventing potential issues with bogus folio pointers or pfn_to_page validation.
